lock.subtitle: QUANTUM INTELLIGENCE
footer.text: UQI · Universal Quantum Intelligence · Internal Tool
qpu.title: Quantum Processing Units
qpu.no_distribution: No distribution data for selected modality.
qpu.boxplot_desc:
Box = middle 50% qubit distribution (Q1–Q3)
Whisker = min/max excluding outliers
pipeline.drop_hint: Drop .py here or click to browse
pipeline.steps_hint: Each step runs independently — select any step and run it directly with the chosen algorithm file and QPU. No prior steps required.
pipeline.analyze.name: Circuit Analysis
pipeline.analyze.desc: Logical complexity — qubits, gates, depth, T-gate ratio
pipeline.optimize.name: Optimization
pipeline.optimize.desc: Physical mapping to target QPU — gate/depth reduction via auto transpile
pipeline.noise.name: Noise Simulation
pipeline.noise.desc: QPU-realistic fidelity — calibration-based noise model on optimized circuit
pipeline.noise.empty: Run noise simulation to see results
pipeline.qec_analyze.name: QEC Analysis
pipeline.qec_analyze.desc: Error correction necessity — T2 ratio, fidelity, recommended codes
pipeline.qec_analyze.empty: Run QEC analysis to see results
pipeline.qec_apply.name: QEC Apply
pipeline.qec_apply.desc: Encode circuit with QEC code — compare fidelity before/after
pipeline.qec_apply.empty: Run QEC apply to see results
pipeline.gpu.name: GPU Benchmark
pipeline.gpu.desc: CPU vs GPU simulation speed — statevector throughput comparison
pipeline.qpu.name: QPU Execution
pipeline.qpu.desc: Submit to real quantum hardware — transpiles & executes on actual QPU
pipeline.qpu.empty: Run analysis first, then confirm to submit
pipeline.job_manager.name: QPU Job Manager
pipeline.job_manager.desc: Monitor & manage submitted QPU jobs — check status, view results, cancel jobs
job.status.running_msg: job is running on QPU queue.
job.results.title: Measurement Results
cache.badge: ⚡ Cached result loaded from previous run.
cache.invalidated_msg:
Cache invalidated ({deleted} entries deleted)
Re-run to fetch fresh results.
alert.select_file: Please select or upload an algorithm file
knowledge.title: Search Knowledge Base
knowledge.no_results: Run a search to see results
pipeline.qpu.warn: This submits to a real QPU and incurs cost. Use "Analyze (No Submit)" first to preview the transpiled circuit before confirming.
knowledge.semantic_hint:
Press Enter to search · Shift+Enter for new line
Chroma vector similarity search
rag.type_desc.stats: Knowledge base record count and per-type breakdown
rag.type_desc.best_combination: Optimization runs ranked by gate reduction — filter by QPU or qubit count
rag.type_desc.suspicious_optimizations: Optimizations flagged for review: empty circuit, non-equivalence, or unverified 100% reduction
rag.type_desc.qec_results: Top QEC experiments by fidelity improvement — effective cases only
rag.type_desc.gpu_benchmark: GPU simulation speedup rankings — top CPU vs GPU acceleration results
rag.type_desc.pipeline_issues: Pipeline error log — failures and root causes per stage & SDK
rag.type_desc.security_block: Static analysis blocks — dangerous imports or patterns detected in algorithm files
rag.meta.optimization.label: Optimizations
rag.meta.optimization.desc: Circuit optimization runs — gate/depth reduction results per combination & QPU
rag.meta.execution.label: Executions
rag.meta.execution.desc: QPU job execution records — shots, fidelity, job IDs, and result metadata
rag.meta.gpu_benchmark.label: GPU Benchmarks
rag.meta.gpu_benchmark.desc: CPU vs GPU simulation performance comparisons
rag.meta.pipeline_issue.label: Pipeline Issues
rag.meta.pipeline_issue.desc: Errors and failures encountered during pipeline stages, with root causes
rag.meta.transpile_pattern.label: Transpile Patterns
rag.meta.transpile_pattern.desc: Transpilation success/failure patterns and workarounds per SDK & QPU
rag.meta.qec_experiment.label: QEC Experiments
rag.meta.qec_experiment.desc: Quantum error correction experiment results — fidelity before/after encoding
rag.meta.qpu_availability.label: QPU Availability
rag.meta.qpu_availability.desc: QPU online/offline status snapshots over time
rag.meta.security_block.label: Security Blocks
rag.meta.security_block.desc: Requests blocked by static security policy — suspicious imports or patterns
rag.meta.conversion_pattern.label: Conversion Patterns
rag.meta.conversion_pattern.desc: Circuit conversion patterns between quantum frameworks (e.g. Qiskit ↔ TKET)
rag.meta.cache.label: Cache
rag.meta.cache.desc: Internally cached computation results for performance optimization
